title: THE FATHER'S HEART - 211info
text: THE FATHER'S HEART THE FATHER'S HEART Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a drop-in day center with services that include two meals a day with a sack lunch to-go, showers by appointment (not wheelchair accessible), haircuts, computer and telephone access, blankets, clothing, shoes, and hygiene items. Referrals to resources surrounding housing, mental health, and substance abuse. Assistance with the determination of homelessness letters to obtain an Oregon ID. 603 12th Street Oregon City, OR 97045 Eligibility: Homeless adults age 18 and older and adults with families Hours: Day Center and meals: Monday-Friday 9am-2pm Showers: Monday-Friday 9am-1pm Email (503) 722-9780 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 722-9780 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, or call for more information. Services are provided on a first come, first serve basis. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: ID, income verification LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Clackamas County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-2pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located on the corner of 12th and Washington Streets near Oregon City Transit Center. TriMet bus lines 32, 33, 79. Services: Bedding/Linen Community Meals General Clothing Provision Hair and Nail Care Homeless Drop In Centers Packed Lunches/Dinners Personal/Grooming Supplies Public Internet Access Sites Public Showers/Baths Shoes Specialized Information and Referral * Homelessness Issues Telephone Facilities If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. THE FATHER'S HEART
